title: Black Knight
description: One of most downloaded packs on my discord server.
body:
# ⚔️ Black Knight — PvP Resource Pack

**✨ Short Description**  
Rule the battlefield with the Black Knight 🖤. A dark, minimalistic PvP pack featuring clean gear, simple GUI, and FPS-friendly performance.  

---

## 💎 Features
- 🌑 Pure **black sky** for max visibility.  
- 🗡️ Custom black swords, armor & tools.  
- 🍏 Dark recolored golden apples.  
- 🎨 Simplified GUI, totems & icons for crystal clear fights.  
- ⚡ Optimized textures for smooth FPS.  

---

## 📥 Installation
1. ⬇️ Download the `.zip` file.  
2. ⚙️ Go to Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → “Open Pack Folder”.  
3. 📂 Drop the zip in, enable it.  
4. 🔄 Apply the pack.  

---

## 🔗 Compatibility
- 🖥️ Versions: **1.20 - 1.21.3**  
- 🪶 Works great with [FoxClient](https://www.foxclient.eu), Lunar, Badlion, Feather & more.  
- ✅ Lightweight for competitive PvP.  

---
